section.title: Value Delivery and Attitudes
section.description: This section assesses how AI has contributed to value delivery in projects and your overall attitudes toward using AI.

questions.text: In which of the following areas has AI use improved your project management outcomes? (Select all that apply)

options.label: Decision-making effectiveness – AI has helped me make more informed or timely project decisions
Stakeholder alignment & communication – AI has improved stakeholder understanding, engagement, or communication
Team productivity – AI has enhanced team collaboration or productivity
Delivery efficiency – AI has accelerated delivery timelines or improved workflow efficiency
Deliverable quality and value – AI has contributed to higher-quality outputs or increased delivered value
Risk and issue management – AI has improved early identification or handling of risks and issues
None of the above – AI has not noticeably improved these outcomes

questions.text: Please rate your agreement with each statement below (1 = Strongly Disagree, 5 = Strongly Agree):

rows.label: I am satisfied with the AI tools I have used in my project management work.
AI tools have been effective in supporting my project management tasks and improving outcomes.
I feel confident using AI tools in my role as a project management professional.
Overall, the benefits of using AI outweigh the potential drawbacks or risks.
I generally trust the outputs produced by AI tools when appropriate controls and reviews are in place.
